messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions

Positions:
- MMM: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: 3M Rose 4% This Month. Here’s How High Shares Could Go in 2026
    Summary: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxOcnJEMzJPbHd1VTFFXzRnbjJ1SW9IcWpIX3IxWmJzMWp2UHJ2Sjh6UU5PS29pS2owNFMtVlhVZFEzQ25RN1RGdURuN0hVTzUtbGliX1YycWM5bHF1Sm5ueFc1TkltUG1CX2pfSnd2Mk1MZExYTDIyS3htei0wdDBQaG9UUVdOUU8tU05ZTkt3?oc=5" target="_blank">3M Rose 4% This Month. Here’s How H

[1] Title: Oil falls as IEA predicts ‘demand destruction will spread’ and hopes for fresh Iran talks grow
    Summary: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said Monday that the next steps in U.S.-Iran peace efforts now depend on Tehran.

[2] Title: China calls U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz 'dangerous and irresponsible'
    Summary: The Chinese foreign ministry said only a "comprehensive ceasefire" would help ease the ongoing crisis in the Middle East.

[3] Title: The Iran war could cost the American taxpayer $1 trillion, says Harvard academic
    Summary: As efforts to reach a lasting settlement have so far proved unsuccessful, one Harvard academic estimates the total could end up far higher than was promised.

[4] Title: JPMorgan Chase is set to report first-quarter earnings – here’s what the Street expects
    Summary: JPMorgan will give investors a view into how consumers and corporations fared at the start of this year as a trio of concerns weighed on markets.

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["MMM"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Directly discusses 3M stock performance and forward price targets, which directly affects the held MMM position value."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Oil demand destruction and Iran nuclear talks do not have a direct connection to 3M's industrial/healthcare portfolio."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Geopolitical commentary on Strait of Hormuz blockade is general Middle East news with no specific relevance to 3M."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Academic estimate of Iran war costs is macro commentary with no direct connection to 3M holdings."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 4,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "JPMorgan earnings preview is banking sector news unrelated to the 3M position."
  }
]
```
